title: Vendor Risk in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger vendor risk in practice judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Vendor Risk in Practice is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Vendor Risk in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good vendor risk in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Vendor Risk in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
